# mtncloud_virtual_image (Data Source)

Looks up an MTN Cloud virtual image by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mtncloud_virtual_image" "ubuntu" {
  name = "Ubuntu 24.04 LTS"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the virtual image to look up (e.g. `Ubuntu 24.04 LTS`).

### Read-Only

- `code` (String) Code of the virtual image.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the virtual image.
- `image_type` (String) Image format/type (e.g. `qcow2`).
- `is_public` (Boolean) Whether the image is publicly available.
- `os` (String) Operating system the image provides.
